executionHistory.summary: Created spec.md: Hospitable connector for STR data ingestion. 2 primary actors, 6 use cases, 22 Gherkin scenarios, 15 requirements, outcome contract. PAT auth, 4 resource types (properties, reservations, messages, reviews), incremental cursor sync.

Updated spec.md from code review findings: +7 requirements (R-016..R-022) for message sync gap, Retry-After parsing, property name cache, sender classification, URL population, message cursor isolation, rating precision. +4 improvement proposals (IMP-005..IMP-008) for calendar/pricing, inquiries, webhooks v2, MCP server. Updated non-goals with Future Considerations for confirmed API capabilities. Updated competitive analysis with 3 integration channels.

Created design.md: API-based connector with 4 new files in internal/connector/hospitable/ (types.go, client.go, connector.go, normalizer.go). PAT Bearer auth, paginated fetch, exponential backoff on 429. JSON cursor per resource type. Edge hints for BELONGS_TO, PART_OF, REVIEW_OF, DURING_STAY. No new DB migrations, no new NATS streams.

Created scopes.md: 3 scopes. Scope 1: API client, types, config (12 unit + 2 integration). Scope 2: Connector interface, normalizer, cursor, registration (14 unit + 3 integration + 2 e2e). Scope 3: Edge hints, cross-domain linking, partial failure, property name cache (8 unit + 4 integration + 2 e2e).
